name: Web Service C2 via Cloud Platforms
description: Detects communication with cloud platforms commonly abused for C2
query:
// Detect C2 via cloud platforms (Pastebin, Discord, Telegram, etc.)
// Trigger on frequent connections to known C2-abused services
events from proxy
where domain matches "(?i)(pastebin\.com|paste\.ee|discord\.com/api|api\.telegram\.org|notion\.so/api|trello\.com.*attachments|slack\.com/api/files)"
group by source_ip
having count(*) > 15
within 300 seconds
